name: GET /api/leads/:id - Fetch a single captured lead by id
description: Operator-facing endpoint behind the admin-cockpit Lead Detail screen. Returns the canonical LeadRecord; 404 when the id does not resolve to a row.
skipReason: lead-service runs on port 4011 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.

testCases.name: Fetch the lead created by the POST /api/leads chain
